property.name: objectApiName
property.label: Object Name
property.description: Enter an object name

property.name: backgroundImageUrl
property.label: Background Image URL (Filtering)
property.description: Add the public URL to display background image here.

property.name: headerLabel
property.label: Header Label (Filtering)
property.description: Enter a value to define the header of the component i.e. Continuing Education Catalog.

property.name: clearAllFilterLabel
property.label: Clear All Button Label (Filtering)
property.description: Enter the label of the clear all button

property.name: searchButtonLabel
property.label: Search Button Label (Filtering)
property.description: Enter the label of the search button

property.name: globalSearchFieldApiName
property.label: Global Search Field Name (Filtering)
property.description: Enter the API name of the global search field.

property.name: globalSearchBoxLabel
property.label: Global Search Box Label (Filtering)
property.description: Enter the label of the global search box

property.name: customFilter1Active
property.label: Custom Filter 1 - Active (Filtering)
property.description: Activate custom filter 1

property.name: customFilter1Label
property.label: Custom Filter 1 - Label (Filtering)
property.description: Label for custom filter 1

property.name: customField1ApiName
property.label: Custom Field 1 - Name (Filtering)
property.description: The API name of the custom filter 1

property.name: customFilter2Active
property.label: Custom Filter 2 - Active (Filtering)
property.description: Activate custom filter 2

property.name: customFilter2Label
property.label: Custom Filter 2 - Label (Filtering)
property.description: Label for custom filter 2

property.name: customField2ApiName
property.label: Custom Field 2 - Name (Filtering)
property.description: The API name of the custom filter 2

property.name: customFilter3Active
property.label: Custom Filter 3 - Active (Filtering)
property.description: Activate custom filter 3

property.name: customFilter3Label
property.label: Custom Filter 3 - Label (Filtering)
property.description: Label for custom filter 3

property.name: customField3ApiName
property.label: Custom Field 3 - Name (Filtering)
property.description: The API name of the custom filter 3

property.name: customFilter4Active
property.label: Custom Filter 4 - Active (Filtering)
property.description: Activate custom filter 4

property.name: customFilter4Label
property.label: Custom Filter 4 - Label (Filtering)
property.description: Label for custom filter 4

property.name: customField4ApiName
property.label: Custom Field 4 - Name (Filtering)
property.description: The API name of the custom filter 4

property.name: predefinedFilters
property.label: Object Filter Criteria (Listing)
property.description: Enter criteria to define the default records to be shown on the continuing education wizard e.g. (reduivy__field__c = 'Test' AND reduivy__field__c = 'A' ) OR (reduivy__test__c = true).

property.name: noOfRecordsPerPage
property.label: Number of Records to Display (Listing)
property.description: Enter a value to show how many number of record card to be visible in a single view i.e. on “show more” the same number will be added.

property.name: imageFieldApiName
property.label: Image Field Name (Listing)
property.description: Api name of the image field to display,Add image of resolution 1500 x 300 pixels.

property.name: field1ApiName
property.label: Field 1 Name (Listing)
property.description: To display record related details enter the API name of the field e.g. StartDate__c or Description__c.

property.name: field2ApiName
property.label: Field 2 Name (Listing)
property.description: To display record related details enter the API name of the field e.g. StartDate__c or Description__c.

property.name: field3ApiName
property.label: Field 3 Name (Listing)
property.description: To display record related details enter the API name of the field e.g. StartDate__c or Description__c.

property.name: field4ApiName
property.label: Field 4 Name (Listing)
property.description: To display record related details enter the API name of the field e.g. StartDate__c or Description__c.

property.name: sortByField1ApiName
property.label: Sort By Field 1 Name (Listing)
property.description: The API name of the first sort by field.

property.name: sortByField2ApiName
property.label: Sort By Field 2 Name (Listing)
property.description: The API name of the second sort by field.

property.name: sortByFieldLabel
property.label: Sorting Picklist Label (Listing)
property.description: Enter the name which will be visible as label on the sorting combobox.

property.name: showMoreButtonLabel
property.label: Show More Button Label (Listing)
property.description: Enter the name which will be visible as label on the show more button.

property.name: filteredResultFoundHeading
property.label: Filter Result Label (Listing)
property.description: Enter the value which will be displayed as heading of filtered result.

property.name: enableDebugMode
property.label: Debug Mode
property.description: Enable debug mode.
